data.title: Duni Group launches a sealable paper bowl to reduce food waste in ready meals
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, on April 28, 2026, Duni Group introduced the Sealable Ronda, a sealable paper bowl designed for salads and bowl meals under the brand Duniform. This innovative product combines paper material with hermetic sealing and modified atmosphere packaging (MAP). The Sealable Ronda aims to prolong the freshness of food items within it, offering a solution for longer shelf-life.

data.title: CARB-X awards funding to AdJane to advance its nOMV platform-derived vaccine for the prevention of gonorrhea
data.description: A new approach known as heterologous method is being adopted to combat Neisseria gonorrhoeae infections by aiming to provide a precise and comprehensive immune response. The Combating Antibiotic-Resistant Bacteria Biopharmaceutical Accelerator (CARB-X) has announced on April 28, 2026, in Boston that they are granting a total of US$2.6 million to AdJane to further develop this method.

data.title: Edgecore Networks Joins Taiwan–Japan Partnership to Advance IOWN All-Photonics Network
data.description: Edgecore Networks, a prominent open networking solutions provider and a subsidiary of Accton Group, took part in the "AI IMPACT: Smart Cities and Southern Taiwan Achievement Showcase." This event, overseen by the National Science and Technology Council (NSTC), revealed the results of the Innovative Optical and Wireless Network (IOWN) all-photonics network application. The showcase, in collaboration with the National Center for High-performance C, highlighted the achievements of this technology.

data.title: Sungrow Hosts GRES 2026, Showcasing Value-Driven Innovation Across Full Energy Scenarios
data.description: In Hefei, China, Sungrow, a top PV inverter and energy storage system provider, recently held the third Global Renewable Energy Summit (GRES) 2026 from April 22 to 25. The summit, themed "Value-Driven, Scenario-Proven," attracted a significant number of participants from across the globe.

data.title: Notice on convening the annual general meeting of Aktsiaselts Ekspress Grupp
data.description: Aktsiaselts Ekspress Grupp (registry code 10004677) Management Board has announced the annual general meeting of shareholders scheduled for 1 June 2026 at 10:00 at Narva mnt 13, 10151 Tallinn. The meeting will take place on the 4th floor, with participant registration starting at 9:30.

data.title: STMicroelectronics brings always-on vision to next-generation personal electronics with new ultralow-power image sensors
data.description: STMicroelectronics is introducing new ultralow-power image sensors for next-generation personal electronics, enabling always-on vision capabilities. These sensors offer remarkable energy efficiency, consuming as little as 20µA per frame, which is significantly lower than current market standards. This advancement allows electronic devices to capture and process images continuously while consuming minimal power. Additionally, the sensors provide high-quality imaging performance with resolution ranging from 400x400 to 1600x1200 pixels. This innovation signifies a major leap in enhancing the functionality and efficiency of personal electronic devices, promising a new era of always-on vision technology.

data.title: Results of Updated Mineral Resource and Reserves; Increases Consolidated M&I to 731koz Au and Inferred Resource to 653koz Au
data.description: The latest mineral resource and reserves update shows a significant increase, with Consolidated Measured and Indicated (M&I) resources now totaling 731,000 ounces of gold (Au) and Inferred resources amounting to 653,000 ounces of gold (Au).

data.title: Swedish pureSignal expands across Europe with new distributor partnership in Iceland
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in GÖTEBORG, Sweden, pureSignal, a technology company from Sweden, announced its ongoing European expansion through a partnership with Icelandic distributor HD Industrial & Technical Services. This collaboration signifies a strategic move to bolster their presence in the region.

data.title: MIMARU Introduces First-time-friendly Sumo Dining Experience at Sumo Live Restaurant in Tokyo
data.description: In Tokyo on April 28, 2026, MIMARU, a prominent apartment hotel brand in Japan catering to families, and managed by Cosmos Hotel Management Co., Ltd., has launched an innovative experience for guests to immerse themselves in a highly revered cultural practice of Japan. The initiative, titled THE SUMO LIVE RESTAURANT HIRAKUZA GINZA, offers a unique opportunity for guests to engage with one of Japan's most iconic traditions.

data.title: Loftie Launches Loftie+ Habit System to Help People Put Their Phones Down
data.description: Today in London, Loftie introduced Loftie+, a revolutionary behavior-change system aimed at transforming habits rather than monitoring data. This launch comes from the maker of the acclaimed alarm clock that serves as an alternative to keeping smartphones on nightstands. Recent studies indicate that more than 50% of adults in the UK and Ireland tend to stay awake past their intended bedtime. This innovative approach by Loftie aims to address this concerning trend and promote healthier sleeping habits among the population.
